monitor_the_situation.title: Iranian FM Araghchi Visits for Ayatollah Khamenei Funeral Preparations
— S4 · Political · Tehran, Iran · 14h ago. Iranian Foreign Minister Abbas Araghchi states his visit includes preparations for the funeral of Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, signaling succession planning.
US Strikes Iran as Tehran Hits Kuwait and Bahrain, Ceasefire at Risk
— S4 · Conflict · Strait of Hormuz · 20h ago. US launches new strikes on Iran after a tanker attack, as Tehran hits Kuwait and Bahrain, raising fears the fragile US-Iran ceasefire could collapse.
